title: CCCP (disambiguation) - Wikipedia
body: СССР is the abbreviation of "Союз Советских Социалистических Республик", the Soviet Union written with Cyrillic characters . The Cyrillic letters С and Р correspond to Latin S and R, so this is also written as SSSR. CCCP may also refer to: C.C.C.P. (band) , a German group CCCP - Fedeli alla linea , an Italian band formed in 1982 Cat Colony Care Programme, in Asia, of the Society for the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals Carbonyl cyanide m -chlorophenyl hydrazone , a toxic ionophore and decoupler of the respiratory chain Combined Community Codec Pack , a software pack for Microsoft Windows to play multimedia content Climate Change and Carbon Plan, a strategic plan adopted by the Oregon Board of Forestry , US See also [ edit ] CCP (disambiguation) California Code of Civil Procedure (CCP) Topics referred to by the same term This disambiguation page lists articles associated with the title CCCP . If an internal link incorrectly led you here, you may wish to change the link to point directly to the intended article.
